testcase.system-err: Oct 04, 2024 10:48:12 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 129 Oct 04, 2024 10:48:12 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 129.0.6668.90. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.20.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: scrollingToElement

testcase.name: mousehover
